creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for providing this hotfix.

Unfortunately this hotfix hard codes /usr/local as ${LOCALBASE} which should not be done.  Please fix the hot fix so it detects where qt5-qwt6 is installed and uses the correct path regardless of what LOCALBASE is.  For example, you can use pkg-config to find Qt5Qwt6 and then use the library names and include paths provided by pkg-config.
